message:
fix(db,exec): use global DB singleton and add UseGlobalEnv option

- Add globalDB singleton pattern in root.go to avoid repeated open/close cycles
- Update activate.go and run.go to use getDB() instead of direct Open/Close
- Add UseGlobalEnv option to exec.RunOptions for vault-based auth switching
- Fix ForceRefresh in authpool/monitor.go to participate in WaitGroup for graceful shutdown
- Increase cooldown penalty from -1000 to -10000 in rotation algorithms

These changes improve database connection handling, fix a potential
race condition during monitor shutdown, and ensure vault-based auth
switching works correctly with caam run.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
